overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, riding through foggy Night City highways at night. The player navigates wet roads illuminated by neon billboards and streetlights, transitioning from industrial outskirts through Jackson Plains and Rancho Coronado districts with dense urban skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial highway under concrete overpasses

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle at high speed through foggy industrial highway corridor beneath overpasses

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass creating covered corridor effect
metal safety fencing running along right side of highway
tall street lighting illuminating the foggy road
dark silhouettes of industrial structures in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy Night City highway, riding beneath massive concrete overpasses in an industrial district. Streetlights pierce the haze while metal barriers line the road, creating a confined corridor atmosphere with minimal traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway entering Jackson Plains with digital advertising

events.description: exits covered industrial overpass area into open Jackson Plains highway with visible digital billboards

agents.ego_description: accelerating on open highway while passing illuminated digital billboards on both sides

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screen displaying corporate messaging
tall highway lighting fixtures lining the road
distant glowing silhouette of Night City skyscrapers on the horizon
overhead highway sign structure spanning across the road

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the industrial overpasses, the highway opens into Jackson Plains with clear views of the distant city skyline. Digital billboards begin appearing along the roadside, illuminating the foggy night as the motorcycle accelerates toward the urban center.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense neon-lit urban highway with corporate towers and stadium

events.description: entering Rancho Coronado district with dense neon skyscrapers and large stadium structure becoming visible

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense urban highway canyon surrounded by towering neon-lit corporate buildings

notable_agents.action: distant vehicle traveling in same direction ahead on the multi-lane highway

entered.detail: large circular stadium bowl with illuminated rim visible against the night sky
tall building covered in bright neon signage and corporate logos
distinctive mega-corporate tower with vertical neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The highway enters the dense urban core of Rancho Coronado, where massive neon skyscrapers including the Arasaka tower dominate the skyline. A large stadium structure passes by on the left while digital billboards and corporate signage create a tunnel of colored light through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved highway ramp with directional signage

events.description: highway curves sharply to the right following yellow chevron directional signs on wet pavement

agents.ego_description: leaning the motorcycle into a sharp right curve on the elevated highway ramp

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving ahead on the curved ramp maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: series of yellow arrow signs indicating sharp right curve in the road
tall concrete wall lining the right side of the curved ramp
elevated highway overpass structure crossing above the road

segments.scene_description: The highway transitions into a sharp right curve marked by prominent yellow chevron signs. The motorcycle leans into the turn, following a black sedan through the elevated ramp section, with the Arasaka tower now visible to the left and concrete walls lining the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed highway corridor lined with close digital advertising screens

events.description: closes distance to follow black sedan through billboard-lined highway section

agents.ego_description: following black car closely through neon-lit corridor of digital billboards at high speed

notable_agents.action: black sedan being followed at close distance through the highway corridor

entered.detail: tall noise-reduction wall with advertising displays on the left side
close-up view of illuminated corporate building exteriors with neon detailing

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a black sedan through an enclosed highway corridor densely packed with bright digital billboards and sound barriers. The neon advertising creates an immersive tunnel of light as the motorcycle maintains close distance to the lead vehicle through the urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person ride through a foggy highway that transforms from a confined industrial corridor into a neon-drenched urban canyon. It begins beneath massive concrete overpasses where streetlights pierce a dense haze, moving through a restricted industrial district with metal barriers. As the motorcycle emerges from the overpasses, the highway opens into Jackson Plains, revealing a distant city skyline and the first glow of digital billboards. The scene then shifts into the dense core of Rancho Coronado, passing a large stadium and towering neon skyscrapers like the Arasaka tower before leaning into a sharp right curve marked by yellow chevron signs. Finally, the camera follows a black sedan into an enclosed highway corridor, where sound barriers and bright corporate signage create an immersive tunnel of colored light.
